creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
[Just for the seek of keeping all information related to this 'pr easily
accessible...]

>   Description
>          
>
>I sent a bug report with a elaborate "how-to-repeat" section.  But
>gnats moved that whole section into "audit-trail" for some reason.

Bill Fenner, in a message dated Sun, 19 Jan 1997 20:40:53 PST, on the
FreeBSD-bugs list, with the subject "Re: bin/2528: fetch(1)'s timeout is
ridiculously short", blamed this on the ">>" string being at the start of
some lines.

Mesg. ref, likely to change over time,
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/search.cgi?words=bin%2F2489&max=250&source=freebsd-bugs&docnum=2
It contains no other relevent useful information.

gnats is unreliable, anyways.
